description_long: This is a ceramic mug with a glossy finish, featuring a deep blue background and geometric abstract artwork in shades of green and teal. The mug has a classic cylindrical shape with a smoothly curved handle attached to one side. On one side, the text 'King's Digital Lab' is prominently displayed in bold white letters. The artwork wraps partially around the mug, creating a modern and visually engaging design. The interior and rim of the mug are a light gray, contrasting with the darker exterior. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for comfortable gripping.
description: A glossy blue ceramic mug with geometric green artwork and 'King's Digital Lab' text, featuring a light gray interior and a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: This view shows the geometric green and teal artwork on the blue background, with the handle partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: This view centers on the handle, showing its smooth, rounded form and the transition between the blue exterior and gray interior.
description_view_2: This view highlights the 'King's Digital Lab' text on the blue background, with the handle on the left side.
description_view_3: This view shows the continuation of the geometric artwork and the blue background, with the handle not visible.
